x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Topology maps provide infrastructure relationship context Now Assist uses for AI-driven impact traversal.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sa_pattern");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=50?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active service mapping patterns",finding:n<50?"Only "+n+" active mapping patterns. Now Assist TSOM topology-based impact analysis requires comprehensive pattern coverage.":n+" active patterns -- Now Assist TSOM has topology foundation for AI impact traversal."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure topology maps for key infrastructure layers. Now Assist TSOM uses topology for AI impact scope assessment.
